title: sterculia mastersii
intro: Sterculia mastersii, also known as the African Bloodwood or Sterculia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sterculia mastersii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its bark can also be used to create a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
